zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Leveson於1514年出生在英國英格蘭肯特肯特時，她的父親Nicholas Leveson40歲，母親Dionyse Bodley29歲。她於1540年與Sir William Hewett在英國英格蘭賀特福爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1561年4月8日在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 迪奧尼斯 巴其享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可倫敦 聖 克萊門特 易亞斯亞普 煙雨 聖 馬丁 奧爾加。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Leveson于1514年出生在英国英格兰肯特肯特时，她的父亲Nicholas Leveson40岁，母亲Dionyse Bodley29岁。她于1540年与Sir William Hewett在英国英格兰賀特福爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1561年4月8日在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 迪奧尼斯 巴其享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰米德萊可倫敦 聖 克萊門特 易亞斯亞普 煙雨 聖 馬丁 奧爾加。

nameMeanings.name: Leveson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Leveson, Loveson (Old English Lēofsunu).

variants.name: Levison
meanings: English: variant of Leveson, from the Middle English personal name Leveson, Loveson (Old English Lēofsunu, from lēof ‘dear, beloved’ + sunu ‘son’).

variants.name: Lewison
meanings: Welsh and English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name   Lewis   (in Wales this was taken as equivalent to the Welsh personal name   Llewelyn  ). In North America, this surname has reportedly absorbed in some cases the Greek patronymic   Iliopoulos  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): patronymic from the personal name Lewi, Polish-influenced form of Levy .

variants.name: Leverson
meanings: Altered form of Jewish   Levison   or   Levinson  .

variants.name: Lowson
meanings: 1 English, Scottish: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Low, a pet form of Laurence ( see Lawrence ) + -son. Compare Lawson , Larson , and Lorrison .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Leveson was born in 1514, in Kent, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Nicholas Leveson, was 40 and her mother, Dionyse Bodley, was 29. She married Sir William Hewett in 1540, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 8 April 1561, in London St Dionis Backchurch, Middlesex, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in London St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Leveson est née en 1514, à Kent, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas Leveson, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Dionyse Bodley, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Hewett en 1540, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 avril 1561, à London St Dionis Backchurch, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à London St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Levesonが1514年にイギリスイギリスケントケントで生まれた時，父Nicholas Levesonは40歳，母Dionyse Bodleyは29歳であった。1540年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアでSir William Hewettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1561年4月8日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト ディオニス バクチャーチで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト クレメント エアストチェアップ ウィス スト マルティン オルガーにて埋葬された。

ko.London St Dionis Backchurch, Middlesex,: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 디오니스 바ckc후르치

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Leveson(이)가 1514년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Leveson(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dionyse Bodley(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 Sir William Hewett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1561년 4월 8일 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 디오니스 바ckc후르치에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 런던 스트 클레멘트 이스트체아프 위스 스트 마틴 르가에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Leveson родилась в 1514 г. в местности кэнт, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Nicholas Leveson было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Dionyse Bodley, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Hewett в 1540 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 8 апреля 1561 г. в местности лондон ст дионис баккчурч, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности лондон ст клемент эасчип вит ст мартинь оргар, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Leveson nació en 1514, en Kent, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Nicholas Leveson, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Dionyse Bodley, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Sir William Hewett en 1540, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 8 de abril de 1561, en London St Dionis Backchurch, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en London St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
